title: Here Comes the Groom
writer: Richard Flournoy, Leonard Praskins, Casey Robinson

plot: Piccolo player Mike Scanlon loses his girl due to his unexciting lifestyle, so he decides to commit a robbery to gain notoriety. But the robbery goes awry and Mike finds himself on the run from the police, pretending to be a famou...
